headline: Gina Rinehart's Hancock Prospecting adds defence stocks to US portfolio
summary: Hancock Prospecting, ownedby Australia's richest person, Gina Rinehart, has added defence,gold and rare-earths holdings to its $3.3 billion U.S. portfoliothis year, filings showed on Monday. ...

headline: Up 231%, Is RTX Proving Why It Was a Mistake for Honeywell to Replace RTX in the Dow Jones Industrial Average?
summary: Honeywell was added to the Dow for its tech focus and diversification across different end markets.
